template.name: BhuKhadan Payment Disclaimer
template.h2: Disclaimer Regarding Payment Processing and Liability
template.p: The BhuKhadan application is a software platform developed and maintained by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED ("REDMELON") solely for the purpose of facilitating digital processing, workflow management, record keeping, and payment administration activities as configured by the concerned Department/Authority.

All payment-related information, including but not limited to beneficiary details, ownership records, bank account information, compensation amounts, award calculations, approvals, and payment authorizations, are entered, verified, approved, and processed by authorized officials of the concerned Department/Authority.

REDMELON does not verify, validate, audit, certify, or guarantee the accuracy, completeness, authenticity, or legality of any data entered into the system by users. The responsibility for ensuring the correctness of beneficiary details, payment amounts, ownership records, and all related approvals rests exclusively with the concerned Department/Authority and its authorized users.

REDMELON shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, financial, legal, or administrative loss, damage, claim, dispute, recovery proceeding, excess payment, short payment, duplicate payment, erroneous payment, fraudulent payment, or payment made to an incorrect beneficiary arising from or related to the use of the application, incorrect data entry, improper verification, unauthorized access, user error, or departmental decisions.

By using the BhuKhadan application, the Department/Authority acknowledges and agrees that all payment approvals and disbursements are undertaken at its sole responsibility and risk. The Department/Authority shall remain solely responsible for compliance with all applicable laws, rules, notifications, financial regulations, audit requirements, and departmental procedures governing such payments.

REDMELON acts only as a technology service provider and shall not be considered a party to any payment transaction, compensation determination, ownership verification process, or beneficiary entitlement decision conducted through the application.

t.t: BhuKhadan Terms & Conditions — platform usage, responsibilities, and service terms for the land acquisition management system by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED.

t.t-value: 'BhuKhadan terms and conditions, REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED, land acquisition platform, legal'

div.p: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern access to and use of the BhuKhadan land acquisition management platform, website, and related services (collectively, the "Platform") provided by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED ("REDMELON", "we", "us").

The Platform is licensed to and operated for the concerned Department/Authority and its authorized officials. By accessing or using the Platform, you confirm that you are an authorized user and agree to these Terms.

BhuKhadan is a technology platform for workflow management, documentation, approvals, and payment administration as configured by the Department/Authority. REDMELON provides software infrastructure, maintenance, and support as a technology service provider only.

All statutory decisions, verifications, approvals, compensation determinations, and payment authorizations remain the sole responsibility of the Department/Authority and its designated officials. REDMELON does not act as a party to land acquisition proceedings or payment transactions.

Authorized users must maintain the confidentiality of login credentials, enter accurate data, follow applicable laws and departmental procedures, and use the Platform only for official purposes. Unauthorized access, data tampering, or misuse of the Platform is prohibited.

Payment-related disclaimers and liability limitations are set out in our Privacy Policy, including the Disclaimer Regarding Payment Processing and Liability. By using payment features of the Platform, you acknowledge those terms.

The Platform, including its software, design, documentation, and branding, is owned by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED or its licensors. No rights are granted except as necessary for authorized use under the applicable service agreement with the Department/Authority.

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, REDMELON shall not be liable for losses arising from incorrect user data entry, departmental decisions, third-party integrations, network interruptions, or events beyond reasonable control. See the Privacy Policy for payment-specific liability terms.
REDMELON may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Platform after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. For questions, contact support@bhuarjan.com.
Platform developed and maintained by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED (REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED).

t.t: BhuKhadan Privacy Policy — data handling, payment processing disclaimer, and liability terms for the land acquisition platform by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED.

t.t-value: 'BhuKhadan privacy policy, payment disclaimer, REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED, land acquisition'

div.p: This Privacy Policy describes how REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED ("REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED", "REDMELON", "we") handles information in connection with the BhuKhadan platform operated for the concerned Department/Authority. Official land records, beneficiary data, and payment information are entered and controlled by authorized government users.
We implement industry-standard technical and organizational measures to protect platform availability and security. Access is restricted to authenticated users authorized by the Department/Authority.
For privacy-related enquiries, email support@bhuarjan.com or visit our contact page.
Platform developed and maintained by REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED (REDMELON BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED).
